attacking_style: Explosive attacks on short, steep climbs (1-3km to go), particularly on final ascents. Favors solo moves from reduced groups or late-race breakaways, combining punchy acceleration with sustained power to hold gaps through technical descents.
team_tactics: Quick-Step/Soudal utilizes him as protected leader with teammates launching decoy attacks before his move. Often sacrifices teammates' sprint chances for his positioning. When in yellow, teammates create tactical chaos while he marks or bonus-hunts.
terrain_preference: Dominates punchy finales: Mur de Huy, short Cat-3/4 climbs with steep gradients (10%+), gravel sectors into climbing finishes. Exceptional descender who recovers time lost on longer climbs. Struggles on sustained HC climbs beyond 15km.
vulnerability: Cracks on sustained alpine/high-mountain ascents when gradients exceed 8-10 miles. Vulnerable in crosswinds when fatigued. Poor tactical awareness in sprint situations (premature celebrations, leadout timing). Declining time trial performance post-2019.
key_patterns: Won La Fleche Wallonne three times attacking final 1-1.3km of Mur de Huy (2018, 2019, 2021)
Frequently attacks 10-15km out solo, using descents to maximize gaps (Tour Stage 8 2019, Stage 16 2018)
Bonus-hunts aggressively when in GC contention rather than passive defense (Tour 2019, Paris-Nice 2020)
Crashes/mechanicals derail races: Strade Bianche 2022, Flanders 2020, Dauphine 2023, Paris-Nice 2020
Rapid form fluctuation: drops badly then attacks 24-48 hours later (Dauphine 2020, Paris-Nice 2020)
Polka dot competition prioritized via calculated breakaway energy management (Tour 2018 KOM with 79pt margin)
form_trajectory: negative: 2023 shows flashes (Dauphine stage win, Pyrenees animation) but cracking on sustained climbs and 4th at Fleche Wallonne defending title signal decline from 2019-2021 peak
built_from: 2021 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
2022 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 4
